title: Superhero Team Roster
scenario: Design a superhero team roster for a comic book series. The roster should include at least 5 unique superheroes, each with their own powers, motivations, and backstories. The output should be in the format of a team roster, with multiple sections and subsections.
constraints: Must include at least 1 superhero with superhuman strength
Must include at least 1 superhero with a unique technology-based power

evaluationCriteria.description: How diverse and varied are the superheroes in terms of powers and personalities?
How well do the superheroes work together as a team?
How many interesting storylines and plot twists can be generated from this team roster?
